headline: The Super-High-Yield Retirement Stocks That Turn a Nest Egg Into a Monthly Paycheck
summary: Five stocks pay you every single month, but yield alone will get a retiree into trouble fast. Here is how the coverage math, balance sheets, and track records sort the durable monthly paychecks from the ones that just look generous on paper.
